title: Auto-Approved Full Run Test Cursor — overseer-gated IDE pipeline
meaning_note: Auto-approve refers to automatic execution of the predefined gate sequence (execution enforcer, folder verify, structure, registry omni, comms sync, etc.) — not waiving Z-OSHA / human release authority. Production deploy and manual_release in data/z_release_control.json remain separate.

hub_only.rule: AAFRTC npm scripts and Z: AAFRTC tasks must run with cwd = ZSanctuary_Universe repo root. In multi-root workspaces, focus that folder or set cwd explicitly.

gate_ci.description: Enforcer gate + folders + structure + registry omni + comms manifests + freshness + system-status + guardian

full_core.description: Heavy local gate: hygiene, lint, test, security, folder manager, python audits, Zuno, guardian

full_bridge.description: verify:full:core plus Z-Bridge append-only log line

no_mixup: Never assume ${workspaceFolder} is the hub in multi-root — run resolve first or use tasks from the ZSanctuary_Universe folder.
Sibling projects under pc_root keep their own package.json; EAII registry in hub lists them — AAFRTC does not mutate sibling repos.
